changes.description: LENS vs SQO Cockpit product distinction. Consumption boundary definition. Shared infrastructure identification. Future PATH B bridge model.

9-section cockpit structure: Overview, Debt, Continuity, Maturity, Remediation, Evidence, Replay, History, Handoff. Per-section: purpose, artifacts, fields, decisions, governance, empty states, forbidden behavior.

5 personas: Semantic Onboarding Operator, Client Implementation Architect, Governance Reviewer, Delivery/Transformation Lead, Internal Product Operator. Per-persona: jobs, decisions, artifacts, forbidden actions, handoff.

10 cockpit objects: Qualification Case, Semantic Debt Item, Continuity Gap, Maturity Dimension, Remediation Pathway, Source Material Requirement, Evidence Chain, Replay Certification, Progression Step, PATH B Handoff Package.
10 allowed actions (inspect, mark, prepare, compare, export). 9 forbidden actions (edit, override, fabricate, bypass, push). Detailed descriptions per action.
10 cockpit states with visual posture, primary action, governance warning, and next operational step. Covers NO_CLIENT through HANDOFF_BLOCKED.

9-step S1→S2 maturation workflow grounded in FastAPI reference data. Current state, blockers, R2 pathway, source material, checklist, expected outputs, validation gates, success criteria, remaining S2→S3 work.
7-step S2→S3 maturation workflow grounded in BlueEdge reference data. S2 stability, ungrounded domains, grounding debt, R4 pathway, evidence needs, S3 criteria, PATH B handoff conditions.
Canonical handoff flow, package contents, minimum readiness criteria, blocked conditions, certification requirements, audit trail, PATH B processing model.
Read-only consumption model for 12 SQO artifact types. Per-artifact: cockpit sections, fields consumed, governance. Additive-only cockpit artifact rules.

14 governance rules: read-only consumption, no SQO→LENS, no AI, no fabrication, deterministic display, fail-visible, governance-classified, no chatbot, PATH B authority, additive-only, no override, forbidden language, evidence-linked.

7 implementation phases: static reader, FastAPI workflow, debt navigation, evidence/replay viewer, handoff builder, source material planner, re-run preparation. Per-phase: objective, UI scope, artifact scope, risk, success condition. Dependency graph.
